texto: There are some people who think runners are snobs. These people are called non-runners. And they're right, of course. There is a certain hubris you develop when you do things no one else does.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jennifer Graham sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “There are some people who think runners are snobs. These people are called non-runners. And they'…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, running, there, útil em momentos de reflexao.
